notes: Big action-variety ladder. Public, automation-tolerant sites. the-internet.herokuapp.com is the canonical hard-interaction playground (dropdown/checkbox/hover/drag/slider/iframe/new-window/dynamic-load). Each task targets a distinct action class so a loss pinpoints a specific primitive gap. Oracles are substring matches on the agent's final answer.

tasks.name: Read a static page
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://example.com and report the page's main H1 heading text.

tasks.name: Extract a fact from a content-heavy page
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Firefox and report which organization develops the Firefox web browser.

tasks.name: Read a value from a data table
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/tables . In the first data table (id 'table1'), find the row whose Last Name is 'Smith' and report that person's email address.

tasks.name: Select an option from a native dropdown
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/dropdown , select 'Option 2' in the dropdown, then report which option is currently selected.

tasks.name: Toggle checkboxes to a target state
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/checkboxes . Make sure BOTH checkboxes are checked, then report how many of the two checkboxes are now checked.

tasks.name: Send a keyboard key and read the result
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/key_presses . Click the input box, press the Enter key, and report what the page says was the key pressed (it displays 'You entered: <KEY>').

tasks.name: Fill and submit a login form
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login . Enter username 'tomsmith' and password 'SuperSecretPassword!', submit the form, and report the green success message shown on the next page.

tasks.name: Hover to reveal hidden content
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/hovers . Hover over the FIRST user avatar image to reveal its caption, and report the username shown in that caption (it looks like 'name: user1').

tasks.name: Trigger async load and wait for content
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/dynamic_loading/1 . Click the 'Start' button, wait for the hidden element to finish loading, and report the text that appears.

tasks.name: Add and remove DOM elements, count
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/add_remove_elements/ . Click 'Add Element' three times, then click exactly one 'Delete' button. Report how many 'Delete' buttons remain on the page.

tasks.name: Open a new window/tab and read it
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/windows . Click the 'Click Here' link which opens a NEW browser window/tab, switch to that new tab, and report the heading text shown on it.

tasks.name: Manipulate a JS SPA with rerendering DOM
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://todomvc.com/examples/react/dist/ , add two todo items 'buy milk' and 'walk dog', then mark the 'buy milk' item as completed by clicking its checkbox. Report how many active (uncompleted) items remain, as shown in the footer count.

tasks.name: HTML5 drag-and-drop to swap elements
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/drag_and_drop . Drag box 'A' onto box 'B' so they swap positions. Then report the letter shown in the FIRST (leftmost) box.

tasks.name: Set a range slider to a target value
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/horizontal_slider . Set the horizontal slider to the value 3 (you can focus it and use arrow keys, or drag it). Report the value currently displayed next to the slider.

tasks.name: Type into a rich-text editor inside an iframe
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/iframe . There is a TinyMCE rich-text editor inside an iframe. Clear its contents and type the text 'hello from agent browser', then report the editor's current text.

tasks.name: Login + add to cart on a real SPA store
tasks.prompt: Use your browser tools to open https://www.saucedemo.com/ . Log in with username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce'. Then add the 'Sauce Labs Backpack' to the cart and report the number shown on the shopping-cart badge in the top right.
